_schema.keys: lowercase first-author family name + year, separated by underscore
_schema.value: { arxiv?: string, doi?: string, url?: string, title?: string }
_schema.notes: Curated lookup for the papers our docstrings cite by author+year. link-citations.py extracts (author, year) patterns from References / Notes sections and rewrites them as markdown links pointing at arXiv when available, the journal DOI otherwise.
